security_proposition: The WinRM-port connection represents remote lateral movement from another host.

operational_response.note: Close or monitor the alert; the affirmative context does not justify containment.

must_not_assert: that a remote peer participated in the connection
that local WinRM use is always authorised or harmless
that a PowerShell command or remote shell was executed

the_trap: Port 5985 resembles remote administration, but both network endpoints are the IPv6 loopback address on the same host.
rationale: A0 and EV-001 are the initiating and receiving views of one TCP connection on source port 53063 and destination port 5985. Both source and destination are ::1, so no remote peer or cross-host movement is present in this transaction. The package does not prove what local operation caused the loopback request.
